comment: Closed command metadata registry (TDD §10). One entry per CLI command dispatched by build.py main; planes.json declares the same command set's privileges. summaries and usages are the canonical source for documentation snippet verification.

attest.summary: Append one operator-signed attestation binding current content side digests.

bundle.summary: Promote the current sealed editions into the deterministic delivery bundle.

bundle-plan.summary: Print the verified proposed bundle config without writing source or evidence.

candidate.summary: Derive one edition's candidate artifact and print its digests.

migrate.summary: Apply closed-class mechanical migrations to relation and gate inventories.

pin-plan.summary: Print the canonical current-pin plan exposing digest drift before pins change.

preview.summary: Derive one edition's internal-review preview artifact.

record-qa.summary: Record manual QA evidence bound to the current candidate and attestations.

release.summary: Seal the current candidate under the active release profile.

status.summary: Report which records authorize the current derivation (read-only).

validate-current.summary: Prove the full verify-current closure plus document-integrity gates on the live checkout.

verify-current.summary: Prove the immutable live navigator state with isolated tests and snapshot brackets.
